summary: Per-ticker social-media metrics, sentiment and catalyst signals aggregated from public discussion.

tools.name: panels.trending
tools.description: Top tickers ranked by social mention count over a rolling window, with mention totals per ticker.

tools.name: signal.ticker_velocity
tools.description: Mention velocity for one ticker over a window: current rate versus the prior period, as a momentum read.

tools.name: signal.track_ticker
tools.description: Enqueue a ticker for proactive tracking so future panels include it; a write operation gated by signal:write.

tools.name: signal.list_tracked_tickers
tools.description: List the tickers this caller has enqueued for tracking, most recent first.
